name: Cilantro Corn Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Corn kernels - cooked and drained
1/4 cup Mild chiles, roasted - chopped, peeled, and seeded
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, sugar, and salt.
2. Stir in cornmeal.
3. In another bowl, lightly beat the egg or egg whites. Add buttermilk, oil, corn, chiles, cilantro, and scallions.
4. Add to dry ingredients; stir until combined.
5. Place a griddle or large skillet over medium-high heat. When hot, brush with oil, then drop batter by large tablespoonfuls onto the griddle.
6. Cook until tiny holes form on each pancake. Turn pancakes; brown on the other side.
7. Pass mild salsa and sour cream to spoon over pancakes.
